columns.extraction_plan: The 'Findings' section on page 1 states: 'Between Nov 27, 2013, and Dec 20, 2018, 1173 patients were enrolled (one patient subsequently withdrew consent for analysis of his data)...'. The 'Results' section on page 5 also states: 'Between Nov 27, 2013, and Dec 20, 2018, 1173 patients were enrolled (one patient subsequently withdrew consent for analysis of his data)...'. Figure 1 on page 5 also indicates '1173 patients enrolled and randomly assigned'.
